summary: Comprehensive testing of mobile onboarding wizard for CrossCurrent Finance Center. Tested both NEW TRADER and EXPERIENCED TRADER flows on mobile viewport (393x852). All core features working correctly including user type selection, date picker, balance validation, dropdowns, save/restore, and wizard completion.

issues: Chart width/height warning in console: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - chart container sizing issue on mobile

critical_code_review_comments: Mobile wizard z-index (z-[9999]) working correctly - wizard displays above all other content
Date picker Popover z-index (z-[99999]) working correctly - calendar displays above wizard
Direction and Product dropdowns render correctly with proper styling
Save & Continue Later stores progress in localStorage and restores on reload
Balance validation ($10 minimum) working correctly with error toast
LOT Size and Daily Target calculations display correctly (Balance/980, LOT*15)
P/L Difference shows green for positive, red for negative variance from target
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile onboarding wizard fully tested. All features working: user type selection, date picker, balance input with validation, product/direction dropdowns, save/restore progress, wizard completion. Minor console warning about chart sizing on mobile but doesn't affect functionality.

features_tested.mobile_viewport_rendering: PASS - Wizard renders correctly on 393x852 viewport
features_tested.user_type_selection_new_trader: PASS - Card selection with checkmark indicator
features_tested.user_type_selection_experienced_trader: PASS - Card selection with checkmark indicator
features_tested.balance_validation_min_10: PASS - Error toast 'Please enter a valid starting balance (min $10)' shown for values < $10
features_tested.date_picker_functionality: PASS - Calendar opens, month navigation works, date selection works
features_tested.date_picker_z_index: PASS - Calendar displays above wizard content
features_tested.product_dropdown: PASS - Shows MOIL10 (only active product in system)
features_tested.save_continue_later: PASS - Toast 'Progress saved! You can continue later.' shown, wizard closes
features_tested.progress_restoration: PASS - After reload, wizard reopens at saved step with all data restored
features_tested.trade_history_entry: PASS - Day navigation, profit input, P/L difference calculation
features_tested.pl_difference_display: PASS - Green for positive (+$0.55), red for negative (-$0.45)
features_tested.wizard_completion_new_trader: PASS - Toast 'Your profit tracker is ready!' shown
features_tested.wizard_completion_experienced_trader: PASS - Toast 'Your profit tracker is ready!' shown after entering all trading days
features_tested.step_indicator: PASS - Shows 'Step X of Y' with progress bar
features_tested.back_navigation: PASS - Back button navigates to previous step

experienced_trader_flow.notes: 4-step flow completed successfully with all 6 trading days entered

save_restore_flow.notes: Progress restored to Step 4 with all data intact

validation_flow.notes: Error toast displayed, wizard remains open

console_warnings: Chart width/height warning - non-blocking, chart container sizing issue on mobile
WebSocket reconnection messages - normal behavior during page transitions
